title: eleusine tenerrima
intro: Eleusine tenerrima, also known as slender eleusine, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against cell damage. Eleusine tenerrima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
